commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
The stone. Another emblem of Christ, the rock, foundation, and corner-stone of his Church.
Eyes. The manifold providence of Christ over his Church, or the seven gifts of the Spirit of God. (Challoner)
The Jews were lately returned from a country where seven chief officers were styled "the king's eyes "having to inform him of the conduct of governors Zorobabel shall build the temple, as a figure of Christ establishing his Church, chap. iv. 10.
Grave. Septuagint, "dig a pit. "The rest agree with us. Christ adorns and instructs his Church. (Calmet)
Day. The day of the passion of Christ, the source of all our good: when this precious stone shall be graved, that is cut and pierced with whips, thorns, nails, and spear. (Challoner)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: One day: Viz., the day of the passion of Christ, the source of all our good: when this precious stone shall be graved, that is, cut and pierced, with whips, thorns, nails, and spear.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Seven eyes: The manifold providence of Christ over his church, or the seven gifts of the spirit of God.-- Ibid.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The stone: Another emblem of Christ, the rock, foundation, and corner stone of his church.-- Ibid.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
